channel.title: Posts on Saleh Muhammed
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Saleh Muhammed

item.title: How I do My Computing
item.description: forked from stallman.org/stallman-computing Computer & OS I use my own-built computer along side with an Ideapad gaming laptop. Currently OpenBSD , before writing this post I used to have a windows OS dual-booted in my machine for work purpose1, today alhamdulilah I've quit this shit so I deleted Windows permanently, and inshallah I will not download it forevermore. There is lots of reasons for me to prefer BSDs over Linux.
